details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest 1-year Windows AV (3 devices, < $40, rating >= 4) to cart
Task 2: Choose product with higher discount from first two search results
Task 3: Create cart with two qualifying products (< $50, rating >= 4)
Task 4: Apply promo SAVE15 and advance to payment step
Task 5: Guest checkout flow and select a payment method
Task 6: Modify cart to keep one Internet Security-like item (qty 2, auto-renew on)
Task 7: Compare two products and add the one covering more devices
Task 8: Configure business-like plan and add to cart
Task 9: Start 30-day free trial for Windows antivirus
